sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8170" key="a)ne/ktomos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνέκτομος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8170.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not castrated, entire,</tr_> prob. in Philotim. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:2:69:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.69.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
